Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Impact Assessment Act
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Impact Assessment Act

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Impact Assessment Act in order to specify that a regulation must not set out a minimum coal production capacity in respect of a new coal mine in relation to which a physical activity is designated.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Section 109 of the Impact Assessment Act is renumbered as subsection 109(1) and is amended by adding the following:

Subsection.MarginalNote: Designated physical activity â coal mines
Subsection.Text: A regulation made under subsection (1) must not set out a minimum coal production capacity in respect of a new coal mine, the construction, operation, decommissioning and abandonment of which is a designated physical activity under paragraph (1)(b).
